name: halba-build-week-video
description: Reproducible Halba Build Week demo film.

scripts.render: remotion render src/index.ts HalbaBuildWeek ../../artifacts/demo/halba-demo.mp4 --public-dir ../../artifacts --codec h264 --crf 18 --browser-executable '/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome'
scripts.still: remotion still src/index.ts HalbaBuildWeek ../../artifacts/demo/halba-demo-still.png --public-dir ../../artifacts --frame 945 --browser-executable '/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome'
